title: Slow Smoked Norwegian Salmon Flatbread
description: A light and herbal Norwegian dish featuring miso marinated salmon on a low carb friendly flatbread, perfect for a healthy lunch or snack
instructions: Preheat the smoker to 100 degrees Celsius
In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, maple syrup, and lemon juice
Place the salmon fillets in a shallow dish and brush the miso mixture evenly over both sides
Let the salmon marinate for at least 30 minutes
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Drizzle the olive oil over the flatbread and sprinkle with salt and pepper
Place the marinated salmon on top of the flatbread
Smoke the salmon for 2 hours or until it reaches an internal temperature of 60 degrees Celsius
Garnish with chopped fresh dill and serve immediately
